huggingface.title: Vidu S1: 실시간 인터랙티브 비디오 생성 모델
huggingface.title_en: Vidu S1: A Real-Time Interactive Video Generation Model
huggingface.summary: 칭화대학교가 발표한, 사용자와 상호작용하며 실시간으로 영상을 생성하는 모델.

huggingface.title: Video-Oasis: 비디오 이해 평가 방식의 재고

huggingface.summary_en: NAVER's work addressing how we evaluate systems that comprehend video content.

huggingface.title: Why Can't I Open My Drawer? 제로샷 합성 행동 인식에서의 객체 편향 완화
huggingface.title_en: Why Can't I Open My Drawer? Mitigating Object-Driven Shortcuts in Zero-Shot Compositional Action Recognition

huggingface.summary_en: NAVER research tackling object-based biases in action recognition without training examples.

huggingface.title: Ideas Have Genomes: 과학적 계보 추론 벤치마크와 계보 기반 아이디어 생성
huggingface.title_en: Ideas Have Genomes: Benchmarking Scientific Lineage Reasoning and Lineage-Grounded Idea Generation

huggingface.summary_en: Shanghai Jiao Tong University's benchmark for evaluating how AI traces scientific intellectual history.

huggingface.title_en: UniClawBench: A Universal Benchmark for Proactive Agents on Real-World Tasks

huggingface.summary_en: University of Hong Kong's benchmark for testing autonomous agents on real-world problems.

geeknews.title: Show GN: 대한민국 제도 100개를 한 장씩 체계도로 만들었습니다
geeknews.title_en: Show GN: I made system diagrams of 100 Korean institutions, one page each

geeknews.summary_en: A take on AI literacy: using AI to raise domain literacy in other fields rather than learning AI itself, via institutional diagrams.

geeknews.summary_en: Examines Lisp's paradigm of adapting the language to the problem rather than just its syntax.
